ads.description: In fair condition for its age, definitely need some TLC. One of the numbers on player two doesn’t work.

ads.author: Tyler Martinez
ads.title: NFL Blitz Arcade Machine
ads.description: NFL blitz 4 player arcade game. Works as it should. Been sitting outside covered so it has some dust and pollen build up but I will clean it before purchase. Game does work though. Kids just dont play it. Will have to pick up. Price is OBO

ads.author: Jordon Brooks
ads.title: Golden tee golf arcade game
ads.description: This is a really fun full size golden tee golf arcade game. It can be set to free play or coin and bill operation. This game could potentially make money if put in the right location or good to add to your game room. Delivery may be available. $450

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: (Pending) Original Gauntlet by Atari Project Cabinet
ads.description: Non workout Gauntlet cabinet. Has original joysticks and monitor / bezel as far as I can tell. Also appears to have original artwork under the black paint on the sides and control panel. Would make for a great retro restoration project!

ads.author: Sherry Thorup
ads.title: ARCADE! 2005 Golden Tee Fore! Arcade Machine – Full Size – Tournament Edition – Works
ads.description: ARCADE! 2005 Golden Tee Fore! Tournament Edition full‐size arcade machine by Incredible Technologies. FULLY FUNCTIONING! Classic bar-style golf arcade game — great for home game room, basement, or garage setup. Details: • Full-size commercial cabinet • Trackball control • Original marquee and artwork • Powers on • Screen and marquee lighting working • Solid cabinet structure Condition: FULLY FUNCTIONAL! Good overall condition for its age. Normal cosmetic wear on control panel and cabinet (see photos). Machine powers on and boots. Buttons, Joy Stick (Ball) working. Working great! This is a heavy commercial machine and will require multiple people and appropriate transportation. Buyer responsible for moving. Serious Buyers! Pickup only. 2041 English Lane, College Park 30337 Zelle or Cash preferred. A STEAL AT $800 Available if posted.

ads.author: Bill Dodd
ads.title: NOS Wells Gardner 19" Arcade Monitors
ads.description: Does your grail arcade game have excessive burn in? Here you go... something you literally never find for sale, which is why I've been hoarding them for 8 years.. NOS Wells Gardner 19" Horizontal Arcade Monitor - $600 NOS Wells Gardner 19" CRT Horizontal Arcade Monitor - $600 NOS Wells Gardner 13" CRT Arcade Monitor - $400 NOS Bestech 19" CRT Horizontal Arcade Monitor $450 Prices are o.b.o. I assume they work, still; but I haven't pulled them to test. I have used other monitors from this batch in arcade restos and they've been great, so far. I can't deliver them but if you want to risk shipping, I'm game to try. Pick up in Spanish fort, Alabama ZipCode 36527 The sooner, the better before I change my mind..

ads.author: Didem Ertaul Oun
ads.title: Vintage Tournament Arkanoid Arcade - in working condition!
ads.description: 1987 Arkanoid Tournament arcade cabinet distributed by Romstar (U.S. distributor for Taito). The game boots and plays! This vintage game has a red control panel and light-colored cabinet. Coin operated with a 25c slot. Pick up only! If here, not sold. Open to negotiate Original CRT monitor (bright and working) Spinner control is present and being used Coin door and coin mechs intact Cabinet structure solid Control panel and inside wear

ads.author: Lee Barnett
ads.title: Adams family arcade machine missing parts
ads.description: This came in a bundle deal looking to recover cost only missing 2 boards and play field spinner by the looks of it but may be missing more . Never seen one of these before so just going by what I see Pick up Thomas cove Dr groveland FL. We will assist in shipping. You can send your own shipping company in or we work with Woody's haul and ace in shipping machines. Cabinet is in great shape just missing parts sold as is. If post is up it's available

ads.author: Conner Edison
ads.title: Williams Expo Pinball Machine (1969) – Non-Working Project
ads.description: Vintage Williams “Expo” pinball machine from 1969. Non-working and being sold as-is. This machine was left in the house by the previous owner, so I do not know its repair history. I have not restored or fully tested it. Good cosmetic presentation overall for its age: • Backglass artwork displays very well • Playfield and cabinet are presentable • Great candidate for restoration, repair, or display Important: • Does not work • Selling as-is • Pickup only • Heavy item, bring help Priced for condition and unknown mechanical/electrical status. Let me know if you have any questions!

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Hang On Project Cab
ads.description: Non working project cab. Cabinet is in great shape but someone stuck an LCD inside with a VGA connection. Includes the board but gets artifacting on power up / display. Board could be repaired.

ads.author: Cory Anderson
ads.title: Carnival Arcade Game
ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Kyle Murray

ads.description: Have a silver strike stand up bowling arcade asking 800

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Police Trainer, Upright Arcade, P&P Marketing 1996
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Police Trainer (P&P Marketing, 1996) Price: $400 (or best offer) Not the original dedicated cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet needs some love due to age. - Monitor powers on, image is good, but likely needs new caps - Lights and sound both work. - Controls function, but the guns need recalibration. - Sold as-is. Highlights: Important: - Price is $400, obo - Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $325 OBO Capcom Bowling upright cabinet. Condition: • Cabinet is very old and needs some love. • Monitor powers on, image is good, but probably needs new caps for long-term reliability. • Lights come on. • Sound works. • Controls are functional. • Sold as-is. • Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Double Axle, Upright Arcade, Taitio 1990
ads.description: Double Axle, Upright Arcade (Taito, 1990) Price: $600 obo Condition: - Cabinet is original and shows its age — it needs some love. - Monitor has been converted to LCD. - Lights power on. - Sound is present. - Game plays and works! Highlights: - Classic Taito racing arcade with unique monster truck gameplay. - LCD conversion makes it easier to maintain. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a collection. - A working cabinet from 1990 — not something you see every day. Important: - Price is negotiable, but only slightly. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Trussville Woodworks

ads.author: Sekou Miller
ads.title: Fast furious arcade game-AVAILABLE
ads.description: Awesome sound and works great/would be awesome in any man cave!! There appears to be lines on the screen in this video. ATTENTION-The price have been reduced to $800 to allow for you to rent the electric stair dolly- i will not reduce price and will not accept to sell without the buyer using an electric dolly. ALSO-no more will I place item on "hold"/"pending" without a deposit

ads.author: Rocky Pal
ads.title: Pair Daytona USA 2 Battle On The Edge Sit Down Arcade Machines
ads.description: Machine on the left works properly, can use a new flyback for brighter picture or adjustment, works fine. Everything works as it should. Coin chutes not used/tested on both machines. Machine on the right needs some work. It is also on Battle On The Edge and I have successfully had it in slave mode and linked but the force feedback on the machine does not work properly is very week. The screen is nice. I have extra parts even boards from a working machine that haven't tried replacing yet. Not the stack, the ones related to feedback. If this is your things, easy. I have a good 4 button panel for second machine as well. Will require some disassembly to get out the door.

ads.author: John Russo
ads.title: Tekken 3 coin operated arcade game
ads.description: Great looking conversion into what was a Mortal Kombat cabinet. 25 inch CRT is bright and clear Works 100%. Good for your man cave, your Airbnb, or your commercial application. Can arrange local delivery nationwide shipping always glad to take trades for other coin games.

ads.author: Matt Drowne
ads.title: Arkanoid Supertop Arcaid Game
ads.description: 1986 Taito Arkanoid Supertop video game. Game works great and powers up. I just turned it on before posting. There are a couple wear marks and peeling along the edge but game its self is great. The white one player button does need to be replaced. Game does have a free play button installed from before I purchased it. Looking for $750 OBO. I can not ship. If it is posted it is available. This comes as is.

ads.author: Robert Stotts
ads.title: Classic Shinobi Full Size Arcade Game
ads.description: This is a full size original Shinobi arcade game. Fully functional and working. It has the original PCB motherboard and I have installed an eprom conversion kit to prevent it from not playing anymore after a certain amount of plays, but I also still have the original EPROMs in case you want to convert it back. I also have the original PCB motherboards for Aliens and Robocop if you are interested. in that as well.

ads.description: Partially shopped/refurbished - “Nice Gottlieb Big Indian. Original playfield with only a minor nick here and there. New plastics & rubbers. Stenciled the cabinet. Backglass is so so. You can see in the pic wh...”

ads.author: Jeff Lynch
ads.title: Original 1986 ENDURO RACER ARCADE MACHINE by SEGA 1986 inRARE*
ads.description: Classic SEGA action. Works 100%. Cabinet and graphics are in good shape. Very exciting, challenging game and fun for the entire family and all ages.. Single player action.

ads.author: Richard Newman
ads.title: Space Invaders Trimline Vintage Arcade Restored to NEW
ads.description: This is a Taito Space Invaders Trimline cabinet, the cabinet is new, the internals are all original (game board, wiring, screen, coin door and front art). Machine is fully functional including coin slots. For a collector, this is a really nice find. Located in Lacombe LA, pickup only.

ads.description: Original galaga game, in fair condition. I am able to deliver for a little fee depending on location. ads.author: Preston Burt
ads.title: Vintage Capcom MAGIC SWORD Arcade Game (1990)
ads.description: Selling a vintage MAGIC SWORD arcade game by Capcom. This game was assembled from a New Old Stock (NOS) Kit by local resto expert (Mitch N) around 2015. The monitor is also a NOS monitor with maybe 250 hours on it total. The only thing missing on this is the clear plexiglass over the monitor and bezel, but since it's in my private home collection, it isn't a big deal to me. Game is available for ground-level pickup at my home in Gainesville, GA 30506. Asking $1,000 OBO and I'm open to trades.
